title: EU Compliance MCP
description: Open-source MCP server providing deterministic, structured access to 50 EU regulations and 2,700+ articles including GDPR, AI Act, NIS2, DORA, and CRA. Every provision hard-linked to official EUR-Lex sources, creating auditable compliance chains for AI systems.

risk_maps: Does not Support OWASP GenAI Security Posture Reporting
